topic: Why Everyone Should Learn to Use AI
script: Let me be honest with you. If you're not learning how to use AI right now, you're going to fall behind. And I'm not saying this to scare you. I'm saying this because I've seen it happen. Every industry is being touched by AI. Whether you're a teacher, a marketer, a designer, or a business owner, AI tools can help you do your work faster and better. The good news is you don't need to become a developer. You just need to understand the basics. Start with one tool. ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Claude. Pick one and use it every day for a week. Ask it to help you write emails, brainstorm ideas, or summarize documents. You'll be surprised how quickly it clicks. The people who thrive in the next five years won't be the ones who fear AI. They'll be the ones who learned to work with it. Start today. Follow me for more tips and see you in my next video.

topic: 3 Free Tools That Replaced My Paid Subscriptions
script: Three free AI tools that completely replaced the paid software I was using. Number one -- Perplexity. I used to pay for research tools and premium search services. Now I just ask Perplexity. It gives me sourced answers in seconds. Number two -- Canva with AI. The free tier now includes AI image generation and magic write. I cancelled my design subscription. Number three -- NotebookLM by Google. This thing turns any document into a podcast or a study guide. I used to pay for summarization tools. Now this does it better, for free. So here's the thing. You don't need to spend hundreds a month on software anymore. These three tools cover research, design, and content processing. And they're all free. If you want the links to all three, comment TOOLS and I'll send them to you. Follow me for more and see you in my next video.

topic: How I Prepare for Any Meeting in 5 Minutes Using AI
script: If you're walking into meetings unprepared, let me show you a trick that takes 5 minutes. Before any meeting, I paste the agenda into ChatGPT and ask three things. One -- what questions should I prepare for? Two -- what data should I bring? Three -- what's the most likely pushback I'll face? ChatGPT gives me a quick brief that covers all three. I walk in prepared, confident, and ready. The difference this makes is huge. People notice when you're the one with the answers. It's not about being the smartest person in the room. It's about being the most prepared. And when AI can help you prepare in 5 minutes, there's really no excuse. Try it before your next meeting. Comment AI and I'll send you the exact prompt I use. See you in my next video.
